ddls:
CREATE TABLE "states" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Name of the state */,
  "total_population" INTEGER /* Total population of the state */,
  "state_code" TEXT /* Two-letter code for each state */,
  "capital_city" TEXT /* The capital city of the state */,
  "area_square_miles" REAL /* The total area of the state in square miles */,
  "state_population_density" REAL /* The population density of the state (population per square mile) */,
  "state_gdp" REAL /* The Gross Domestic Product of the state */,
  "state_governor" TEXT /* The name of the current governor of the state */,
  "state_legislature" TEXT /* The type of state legislature (unicameral or bicameral) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "crime_statistics" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state */,
  "total_murders" INTEGER /* Total number of murders */,
  "total_firearms" INTEGER /* Total number of firearms used in crimes */,
  "handguns" INTEGER /* Number of handguns used in crimes */,
  "rifles" INTEGER /* Number of rifles used in crimes */,
  "shotguns" INTEGER /* Number of shotguns used in crimes */,
  "unknown_firearms" INTEGER /* Number of unknown firearms used in crimes */,
  "knives" INTEGER /* Number of knives used in crimes */,
  "other_weapons" INTEGER /* Number of other weapons used in crimes */,
  "hands_feet_etc" INTEGER /* Number of murders committed with hands, feet, etc. */,
  "murders_and_nonnegligent_manslaughter" INTEGER /* Total number of murders and nonnegligent manslaughters */,
  "gun_ownership_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of gun ownership in the state */,
  "murders_and_nonnegligent_manslaughter_rate" REAL /* Rate of murders and nonnegligent manslaughters per 100,000 population */,
  "murder_rate" REAL /* Rate of murders per 100,000 population */,
  "gun_murder_rate" REAL /* Rate of gun-related murders per 100,000 population */,
  "year" INTEGER /* The year to which the statistics apply */,
  "total_crimes" INTEGER /* Total number of crimes */,
  "crime_rate" REAL /* Overall crime rate per 100,000 population */,
  "violent_crime_rate" REAL /* Rate of violent crimes per 100,000 population */,
  "property_crime_rate" REAL /* Rate of property crimes per 100,000 population */,
  "crimes_with_guns" INTEGER /* Total number of crimes involving guns */,
  "crimes_with_knives" INTEGER /* Total number of crimes involving knives */,
  "crimes_with_other_weapons" INTEGER /* Total number of crimes involving other weapons */,
  "crimes_with_hands_feet_etc" INTEGER /* Total number of crimes committed with hands, feet, etc. */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id", "year")
)

CREATE TABLE "weapon_types" (
  "weapon_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weapon type */,
  "weapon_name" TEXT /* Name of the weapon type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the weapon type */,
  "is_firearm" INTEGER /* A boolean indicating whether the weapon is a firearm */,
  "is_lethal" INTEGER /* A boolean indicating whether the weapon is lethal */,
  "average_cost" REAL /* The average cost of the weapon */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("weapon_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "state_weapon_usage" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state */,
  "weapon_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weapon type */,
  "usage_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the weapon type was used in crimes in the state */,
  "year" INTEGER /* The year to which the usage count applies */,
  "usage_rate" REAL /* The rate of usage per 100,000 population */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id", "weapon_id", "year")
)

CREATE TABLE "crime_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each crime category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the crime category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the crime category */,
  "is_violent" INTEGER /* A boolean indicating whether the crime category is violent */,
  "is_property" INTEGER /* A boolean indicating whether the crime category is a property crime */,
  "average_sentence" TEXT /* The average sentence length for crimes in this category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "state_crime_categories" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each crime category */,
  "crime_count" INTEGER /* Number of crimes in the category for the state */,
  "year" INTEGER /* The year to which the crime count applies */,
  "crime_rate" REAL /* The rate of crimes per 100,000 population */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id", "category_id", "year")
)

CREATE TABLE "population_demographics" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state */,
  "age_distribution" TEXT /* Age distribution of the population */,
  "gender_distribution" TEXT /* Gender distribution of the population */,
  "race_distribution" TEXT /* Race distribution of the population */,
  "ethnicity_distribution" TEXT /* Ethnicity distribution of the population */,
  "year" INTEGER /* The year to which the demographics apply */,
  "median_age" REAL /* The median age of the population */,
  "median_income" REAL /* The median household income */,
  "education_level" TEXT /* The distribution of education levels in the population */,
  "employment_rate" REAL /* The employment rate */,
  "unemployment_rate" REAL /* The unemployment rate */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id", "year")
)

CREATE TABLE "gun_laws" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state */,
  "background_check_requirements" TEXT /* Requirements for background checks on gun purchases */,
  "waiting_period" TEXT /* Waiting period for gun purchases */,
  "open_carry_laws" TEXT /* Laws regarding open carry of firearms */,
  "concealed_carry_laws" TEXT /* Laws regarding concealed carry of firearms */,
  "red_flag_laws" TEXT /* Red flag laws to temporarily remove firearms from individuals in crisis */,
  "year" INTEGER /* The year to which the laws apply */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* The date when the laws were last updated */,
  "stand_your_ground_laws" TEXT /* Information about stand-your-ground laws */,
  "castle_doctrine_laws" TEXT /* Information about castle doctrine laws */,
  "assault_weapon_bans" TEXT /* Information about bans on assault weapons */,
  "gun_free_zones" TEXT /* Information about gun-free zones */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id", "year")
)

CREATE TABLE "police_force" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state */,
  "total_police_officers" INTEGER /* Total number of police officers */,
  "police_per_1000_population" REAL /* Number of police officers per 1000 population */,
  "budget" REAL /* Annual budget for the police force */,
  "funding_source" TEXT /* Primary funding source for the police force */,
  "year" INTEGER /* The year to which the data applies */,
  "average_age" REAL /* The average age of police officers */,
  "average_service_years" REAL /* The average number of years of service */,
  "female_officers_percentage" REAL /* The percentage of female police officers */,
  "male_officers_percentage" REAL /* The percentage of male police officers */,
  "diversity_index" REAL /* A measure of the diversity of the police force */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id", "year")
)

CREATE TABLE "public_opinion" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state */,
  "support_for_stricter_gun_laws" TEXT /* Percentage of the population supporting stricter gun laws */,
  "concern_about_crime" TEXT /* Percentage of the population concerned about crime */,
  "trust_in_police" TEXT /* Percentage of the population trusting the police */,
  "year" INTEGER /* The year to which the data applies */,
  "opinion_source" TEXT /* The source of the public opinion data (e.g., survey, poll) */,
  "sample_size" INTEGER /* The sample size of the survey or poll */,
  "margin_of_error" TEXT /* The margin of error for the survey or poll */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id", "year")
)

CREATE TABLE "gun_ownership" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state */,
  "households_with_guns" INTEGER /* Number of households with guns */,
  "registered_guns" INTEGER /* Number of registered guns */,
  "unregistered_guns" INTEGER /* Number of unregistered guns */,
  "gun_ownership_regulation" TEXT /* Regulations for gun ownership */,
  "year" INTEGER /* The year to which the data applies */,
  "gun_owners_percentage" REAL /* The percentage of the population that owns guns */,
  "average_guns_per_household" REAL /* The average number of guns per household */,
  "registered_owners_percentage" REAL /* The percentage of gun owners who are registered */,
  "unregistered_owners_percentage" REAL /* The percentage of gun owners who are unregistered */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id", "year")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, analyst, public user) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* The last date the user logged into the system */,
  "last_activity" TEXT /* The last date the user was active in the system */,
  "status" TEXT /* The status of the user account (e.g., active, inactive, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the system was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "user_ip" TEXT /* The IP address of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_location" TEXT /* The location from which the user accessed the system (e.g., city, country) */,
  "access_duration" TEXT /* The duration of the user's session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
